# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.
# Category: kong_no_auth

services:
  - name: service1
    url: http://service1:8080
    routes:
      - name: route1
        paths:
          - /service1
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST

  - name: service2
    url: http://service2:8080
    routes:
      - name: route2
        paths:
          - /service2
        methods:
          - GET

  - name: service3
    url: http://service3:8080
    routes:
      - name: route3
        paths:
          - /service3
        methods:
          - GET
          - PUT
          - DELETE

upstreams:
  - name: upstream_service1
    targets:
      - target: service1_target1:80
        weight: 100
      - target: service1_target2:80
        weight: 100

  - name: upstream_service2
    targets:
      - target: service2_target1:80
        weight: 100

  - name: upstream_service3
    targets:
      - target: service3_target1:80
        weight: 100
      - target: service3_target2:80
        weight: 100

plugins:
  - name: rate-limiting
    service: service1
    config:
      second: 5
      hour: 20000
      
  - name: cors
    service: service2
    config:
      origins: "*"
      methods: "GET, POST"
